bug_summary: In handle_overlay_key the overlay modal state is moved out of self via Option::take() at the top and only restored at the bottom, but the copy-out arm used `?` to propagate a clipboard error, early-returning past the restore so the modal is silently lost (and never reopened) whenever the copy fails.

cases.title: Overlay modal taken out of self leaks when copy error is `?`-propagated past the restore
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: State moved out of self with take() is dropped when an error is `?`-propagated before the restore
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
